description: Preserve the shipped cache-aware E2E cost-gate and prefix-stability contract by keeping shared usage math, archive fields, gate behavior, and targeted validations aligned.

userStories.title: Centralize cache-aware usage rates and derived metrics
userStories.description: Keep a single runtime source of truth for usage aggregation, rate resolution, cache-aware cost calculation, and primary-metric selection so E2E helpers and runtime observability consume the same billing semantics.
acceptanceCriteria: A shared runtime helper resolves `MERLION_COST_INPUT_PER_1M`, `MERLION_COST_OUTPUT_PER_1M`, and optional `MERLION_COST_CACHED_INPUT_PER_1M` without duplicating env parsing in E2E helpers.

Derived usage metrics include `uncached_prompt_tokens`, `cached_prompt_ratio`, `effective_input_tokens`, `effective_total_tokens`, `primary_metric`, `primary_metric_value`, and `primary_metric_degraded_reason`, plus `estimated_cost_usd` when shared rates are available.

When any usage sample lacks `cached_tokens`, derived metrics record `primary_metric_degraded_reason = "cached_tokens_unavailable"`, stop applying cached-input discount for missing samples, and keep `estimated_cost_usd` as the primary metric when rates exist or fall back to `effective_total_tokens` when they do not.
Usage tracker aggregation and cost math are covered by unit tests for cached, uncached, and degraded cases.
userStories.notes:
Source specs:
- docs/features/107-cache-aware-cost-gate-and-prefix-stability.md (107 Cache-Aware Cost Gate And Prefix Stability)
Files:
- src/runtime/usage.ts
- tests/usage.test.ts
Verification:
- node --experimental-strip-types --test tests/usage.test.ts
Notes:
- The source spec is marked implemented; this story preserves the existing shared contract rather than adding new scope.
- Do not introduce a second pricing table or E2E-only cost formula.

userStories.title: Persist derived totals and prefix-stability diagnostics in archives
userStories.description: Wire E2E archive payloads to the shared derived metrics and preserve prompt observability snapshots so reviewers can distinguish raw prompt growth from cache-hit regression without digging through free-form logs.
acceptanceCriteria: Archive payloads keep raw provider `usage_samples` and add top-level `derived_totals` with stable field names for `uncached_prompt_tokens`, `cached_prompt_ratio`, `effective_input_tokens`, `effective_total_tokens`, `primary_metric`, `primary_metric_value`, and `primary_metric_degraded_reason`, plus `estimated_cost_usd` when rates are configured.
Archive `derived_totals` come from shared runtime usage helpers instead of an E2E-local billing implementation.
Archive `prompt_observability` remains a per-turn sorted snapshot stream containing prefix-stability signals such as `stable_prefix_tokens`, `stable_prefix_ratio`, and tool-schema token estimates.
Archive tests cover both the normal cache-aware case and the degraded `cached_tokens_unavailable` case while preserving prefix-stability triage data.
userStories.notes:
Source specs:
- docs/features/107-cache-aware-cost-gate-and-prefix-stability.md (107 Cache-Aware Cost Gate And Prefix Stability)
Files:
- tests/e2e/helpers.ts
- tests/e2e/helpers_archive.test.ts
- src/runtime/prompt_observability.ts
- tests/prompt_observability.test.ts
Verification:
- node --experimental-strip-types --test tests/e2e/helpers_archive.test.ts
- node --experimental-strip-types --test tests/prompt_observability.test.ts
Notes:
- Do not invent a second per-turn cost archive; keep per-turn detail in `prompt_observability` and top-level billing decisions in `derived_totals`.

userStories.title: Evaluate baselines with a cost-primary gate and raw-token guardrail
userStories.description: Maintain the cost gate as a dual-layer contract: a cache-aware primary metric for budget enforcement and a separate raw-token guardrail for prompt-size diagnostics, while preserving backward compatibility with legacy baselines.
acceptanceCriteria: Cost baseline schema supports `primary_metric.baselines` for `effective_total_tokens` and `estimated_cost_usd`, with optional `guardrails.total_tokens` thresholds and severity.

Gate evaluation selects `estimated_cost_usd` when shared derived totals provide it, otherwise `effective_total_tokens`, and only uses plain `totalTokens` as a compatibility path when derived totals are absent.

Gate output clearly states whether the blocking condition came from the cost-primary gate or the raw-token guardrail and includes observed value, threshold, baseline, and degraded reason when present.
Legacy baseline entries that only declare `total_tokens` are upgraded into the new contract with backward-compatible defaults.
The raw-token guardrail remains diagnostic by default and does not become a second default blocking gate.
userStories.notes:
Source specs:
- docs/features/107-cache-aware-cost-gate-and-prefix-stability.md (107 Cache-Aware Cost Gate And Prefix Stability)
Files:
- src/runtime/cost_gate.ts
- docs/cost-baseline.json
- tests/cost_gate.test.ts
Verification:
- node --experimental-strip-types --test tests/cost_gate.test.ts
Notes:
- Keep `docs/cost-baseline.json` readable while preserving the upgrade path from the older `total_tokens` schema.

userStories.title: Apply the shared gate contract to targeted E2E scenarios and live validation
userStories.description: Keep the five targeted E2E scenarios on the shared archive and cost-gate path, preserve the narrowed tool-exposure behavior from feature 106, and document live verification for fallback versus USD-primary gating.
acceptanceCriteria: The `e2e-read`, `e2e-search`, `e2e-edit`, `e2e-multi-tool`, and `e2e-tool-error` scenarios run through the shared archive and cost-gate helpers without reverting to full tool-schema exposure.
E2E cost-gate reporting includes archive-path diagnostics and preserves the distinction between a cost-primary regression and a raw-token warning.
Live cache-hit validation covers both repeated follow-up turns and session-resume prefix stability, with assertions tied to stable-prefix and cached-token signals.

External-key verification covers both no-rate fallback to `effective_total_tokens` and rate-configured switching to `estimated_cost_usd`, with skipped or fallback cases called out explicitly when keys or rates are absent.
Broad runtime verification still uses `npm run test:all`.
userStories.notes:
Source specs:
- docs/features/107-cache-aware-cost-gate-and-prefix-stability.md (107 Cache-Aware Cost Gate And Prefix Stability)
Files:

- tests/e2e/e2e_search.test.ts
- tests/e2e/e2e_edit.test.ts
- tests/e2e/e2e_multi_tool.test.ts
- tests/e2e/e2e_tool_error.test.ts
- tests/e2e/e2e_cache_hit_rate.test.ts

Verification:
- node --experimental-strip-types --test tests/e2e/e2e_cache_hit_rate.test.ts
- MERLION_COST_GATE=fail node --experimental-strip-types --test --test-concurrency=1 tests/e2e/e2e_cache_hit_rate.test.ts tests/e2e/e2e_read.test.ts tests/e2e/e2e_search.test.ts tests/e2e/e2e_edit.test.ts tests/e2e/e2e_multi_tool.test.ts tests/e2e/e2e_tool_error.test.ts
- MERLION_COST_GATE=fail MERLION_COST_INPUT_PER_1M=<input> MERLION_COST_OUTPUT_PER_1M=<output> MERLION_COST_CACHED_INPUT_PER_1M=<cached> node --experimental-strip-types --test --test-concurrency=1 tests/e2e/e2e_cache_hit_rate.test.ts tests/e2e/e2e_read.test.ts tests/e2e/e2e_search.test.ts tests/e2e/e2e_edit.test.ts tests/e2e/e2e_multi_tool.test.ts tests/e2e/e2e_tool_error.test.ts
- npm run test:all
Notes:
- Do not add new user-visible blocking gate behavior to CLI, wechat, or other formal runtime paths in this story.
- This story preserves the shipped E2E-facing contract and validation surface.
